title: Ability to filter emails from an address from creating an item

posts.author: CWest (Chloe Westhead)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are using Service as for our main team contact email address.
The same email address is a member of a distribution group where internal automated emails are sent to notify us of client go-lives.

I am trying to use this so that I can prevent emails sent to the distribution group from creating a request.

On the automation, I have added a Filter where the Receiver Is Not but Support have advised this is only relevant for Work Management to filter the Updates tab and doesn’t work on Emails
